titleStmt.title: SII 9.285: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 285. (A.R. No. 470 of 1914.) ON A SLAB SET UP AT THE ENTRANCE INTO THE COMPOUND OF THE VIRABHADRA TEMPLE AT HOLAL, HADAGALLI TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and not dated. It refers itself to the reign of the ChńĀlukya king Tribhuvanamalladńďva and mentions some DaŠĻáŠłćanńĀyakas (names lost). It mentions some gift of land made for the service of a god (name lost). The MahńĀjanas of the village GaŠĻáŠłćarńĀdityana-PoŠł∑al are described here as observing religious rites and practising yŇćga. They were also brave warriors.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
